net.airqo.uganda.Site.name: Site
net.airqo.uganda.Site.description: Reference data for an AirQo monitoring site, including its geographic location, administrative area, and online status.

net.airqo.uganda.Measurement.name: Measurement
net.airqo.uganda.Measurement.description: Near-real-time air quality measurement from an AirQo low-cost sensor, typically published at hourly intervals.

schema.name: Site

site_id.description: AirQo site identifier. A 24-character hexadecimal MongoDB ObjectId assigned by the AirQo platform (e.g. '60d058c8048305120d2xxxxx').

name.description: Human-readable site name assigned during deployment, typically referencing a local landmark or neighbourhood (e.g. 'Makerere University').

formatted_name.description: Full geocoded address string for the monitoring site as returned by the AirQo platform reverse-geocoder.

latitude.description: Approximate latitude of the monitoring site in decimal degrees north. Negative values indicate southern hemisphere.

longitude.description: Approximate longitude of the monitoring site in decimal degrees east. Negative values indicate western hemisphere.

country.description: Country where the monitoring site is located, as reported by the AirQo platform (e.g. 'Uganda', 'Kenya').

region.description: Administrative region or province where the monitoring site is located (e.g. 'Central Region', 'Kilifi County').

city.description: City or town nearest to the monitoring site (e.g. 'Kampala', 'Jinja').

is_online.description: Whether the site is currently reporting data to the AirQo platform. True indicates the site transmitted data recently.

schema.description: Reference record for an AirQo air quality monitoring site, describing its human-readable name, geocoded address, GPS coordinates, administrative area, and current online status. Sourced from the AirQo grids summary API.

schema.name: Measurement

site_id.description: AirQo site identifier linking this measurement to its monitoring location. A 24-character hexadecimal MongoDB ObjectId.

device.description: Short device name assigned by AirQo, typically prefixed with 'aq_' followed by a numeric sequence (e.g. 'aq_01').

device_id.description: AirQo internal device identifier. A 24-character hexadecimal MongoDB ObjectId uniquely identifying the physical sensor unit.

timestamp.description: Observation timestamp in UTC as reported by the AirQo platform, typically aligned to the top of each hour.

pm2_5_raw.description: Raw (uncalibrated) PM2.5 mass concentration as reported directly by the low-cost particulate sensor. Unit: micrograms per cubic meter.

pm2_5_calibrated.description: Calibrated PM2.5 mass concentration after applying the AirQo machine-learning calibration model. Unit: micrograms per cubic meter.

pm10_raw.description: Raw (uncalibrated) PM10 mass concentration as reported directly by the low-cost particulate sensor. Unit: micrograms per cubic meter.

pm10_calibrated.description: Calibrated PM10 mass concentration after applying the AirQo machine-learning calibration model. Unit: micrograms per cubic meter.

temperature.description: Ambient air temperature measured by the on-board sensor at the time of observation. Unit: degrees Celsius.

humidity.description: Relative humidity of the ambient air measured by the on-board sensor at the time of observation. Unit: percent.

latitude.description: Latitude of the device at the time of measurement in decimal degrees north, as reported in the measurement payload.

longitude.description: Longitude of the device at the time of measurement in decimal degrees east, as reported in the measurement payload.

frequency.description: Temporal resolution of the measurement as reported by the AirQo API (e.g. 'hourly', 'daily').

schema.description: Near-real-time air quality measurement from an AirQo low-cost sensor deployed in the AirQo network. Includes raw and calibrated PM2.5 and PM10 concentrations, ambient temperature, humidity, and device location. Measurements are typically published at hourly intervals.
